chunks.text: From 2022 onward, sharp inflation occurred across the world.
The price of everything rose considerably.
Supply chain disruption due to the pandemic, Russia's invasion of Ukraine
These combined to create a tremendous rise in prices.
In response, central banks raised interest rates.
The borrowing cost for businesses and households rose, and consumption and investment cooled.
Many countries stood at the edge of recession.
The pain of rising prices is not equal.
Wealthy households hold asset and are relatively protected.
food and utility costs become a burden that presses on daily life.
The national deficit has also grown.
Social security expenses swell, and tax revenue alone cannot cover them.
Debt becomes an obligation to future generations.
The challenge of the economy cannot be solved by one country alone.
In our globalized age, international coordination is the foundation of a sustainable economy.
